content_sections.heading: Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 notification released for 101 posts of Junior Clerk. Candidates with Any Graduate Can Apply Online. The Online application process for Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 has started on 01-07-2026 and will remain open until 30-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Kamdhenu University website, https://www.kamdhenuuni.edu.in/.

content_sections.heading: Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The Kamdhenu University Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on 01-07-2026 at https://www.kamdhenuuni.edu.in/. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. Kamdhenu University Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : Kamdhenu University Junior Clerk Online Form 2026 Post Date : 01-07-2026 Total Vacancy : 101 Posts Brief Information: The Kamdhenu University has announced a notification for the recruitment of Junior Clerk Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

content_sections.heading: Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 Notification Overview
content_sections.text: The Kamdhenu University has officially released a recruitment notification for Junior Clerk. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

rows.kamdhenu_university_advt_no_01_2026_juni: Application Fee For Unreserved (General) Male/Female: Rs 1000 + bank transaction charges For Reserved Category Male/Female (EWS/SC/ST/SEBC): ₹500 + bank transaction charges For PwBD Candidates : Rs 500 + bank transaction charges For Ex-Servicemen Candidates : Nil (No Fee)
Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 Important Dates Starting Date for Apply Online: 01-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 30-07-2026
Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 Age Limit Minimum Age Limit: 20 Years Maximum Age limit: 45 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.
Eligibility Criteria Candidates Should Posses any graduate degree from a university
Salary and Pay Scale First 5 Years: Fixed ₹29,000 per month After 5 Years (on regularization): Pay Level-2 (₹19900-63200) plus other admissible allowances
Kamdhenu University Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Kamdhenu University Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 31 July 2026, up to 23:59 hours.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 101 Junior Clerk (Class-3) vacancies in the non-educational administrative cadre.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Kamdhenu University Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: Unreserved candidates must pay ₹1000, reserved category and PwBD candidates pay ₹500, and Ex-Servicemen candidates are exempted from the fee, all plus applicable bank transaction charges.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for the Junior Clerk post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a graduate degree from a recognized university along with basic computer knowledge, and must be between 20 and 45 years of age (including relaxations) as on 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Kamdhenu University Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves a Preliminary Exam (screening only), a Main Exam (200 marks), and document verification for merit-listed candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there negative marking in the Kamdhenu University exam?
faq.answer: Yes, 0.25 marks are deducted for each wrong answer in both the Preliminary and Main Examinations.

faq.question: Q7. What is the starting salary for Kamdhenu University Junior Clerk?
faq.answer: Selected candidates receive a fixed ₹29,000 per month for the first five years, after which they move to Pay Level-2 (₹19900-63200).

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualifying mark in the exam?
faq.answer: Candidates must secure at least 40% marks in both the Preliminary and Main Examinations, with no relaxation in this qualifying standard for any category.

faq.question: Q9. Is age relaxation available for reserved category candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation ranges from 5 years for general category women and reserved category men, up to 20 years for reserved category PwBD women, subject to a maximum age of 45 years.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through www.kamdhenuuni.edu.in from 1 July 2026 to 31 July 2026 by filling the application form and paying the applicable fee.
